heading: Indexes
body:
This collection contains the following indexes:

| Name                                                  | Index                             | Description                                                 | Properties |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- |
| \_id\_                                                | \{ "\_id": 1 }                    | Primary key index on the \_id field.                        |            |
| cast\_text\_fullplot\_text\_genres\_text\_title\_text | \{ "\_fts": "text", "\_ftsx": 1 } | Text index on the cast, fullplot, genres, and title fields. | Sparse     |
